steps.title: Identify the structures
steps.content: The left side “many are still well” is an independent clause with a linking verb that needs a predicate adjective. The right side “Fama Diagne Sène, for example, is a celebrated playwright from Senegal” is a complete independent clause.

steps.title: Apply the punctuation rule
steps.content: A colon introduces an example after an independent clause. The choice “known:” completes the first clause and uses the colon to introduce the supporting example. Choices B, C, and D all fail: B creates faulty coordination, C creates a comma splice, and D creates a fused sentence. That matches choice A — A is correct.
